justification: The issue title and body indicate a problem with the type of input to the scalar function when using `np.vectorize` to convert `np.datetime64` to `datetime.datetime`. This is consistent with other bug reports in the repository.
current_state_summary: The issue is open and labeled as a bug. The code example provided does not produce an error message but shows unexpected behavior in the type of input to the scalar function when using `np.vectorize`. Related issues are present, indicating ongoing maintenance efforts.

related_issues.title: BUG: calling np.sqrt on an array containing only floats, but of dtype object, will crash
BUG: Confusing error message when `numpy` importing `numpy.__config__` raises `ImportError` for legit reasons
